## Gaps

None. All §14.3 + §14.4 onboarding-wizard rows mapped. SET-100 and SET-101 explicitly out-of-scope (different features, listed in §14.4 only because the table aggregates all settings UI surfaces).

## Notes for downstream consumers

- All UI tasks (T-004..T-010) depend on T-001 (schema) + T-002 (state actions) + T-003 (skip action).
- Task T-005..T-009 are parallel-safe with each other (file-disjoint per `apps/web/app/(onboarding)/<step>/page.tsx`).
- Task T-011 (E2E) is final — depends on all UI tasks landing.
- This slice intentionally decomposes the PRD AS WRITTEN. The gap-backlog (`_meta/plans/2026-04-30-ux-prd-plan-gap-backlog.md`) proposes additions (SET-001 launcher drop, gs1_prefix in step 1, ltree path in step 3, Back/Jump/Restart, route guard middleware, first_wo_at capture). Those are tracked as plan-update items S-PU1..S-PU4 + T-02SETe-007a there and are NOT regenerated here — they would be a second decomposition pass after PRD §14.3 is amended per gap backlog.
